assertions.title: Tab key jumps to next uncertain entity

steps.expected: Uncertain entities are present and jump/download controls reflect unresolved state
steps.observed: Count chips were Removing=1, Keeping=0, Uncertain=3 and jump button was visible

steps.expected: Focus moves to next UNCERTAIN entity; sidebar row becomes active
steps.observed: Focused highlight became entity-2 (UNCERTAIN) and active sidebar row was US_EIN

steps.expected: Focus advances to the following UNCERTAIN entity in document order
steps.observed: Focused highlight advanced to entity-3 (UNCERTAIN) and active sidebar row switched to ZIP_CODE

evidence.network: No API/network activity required for this keyboard navigation assertion

assertions.title: R and K keyboard shortcuts set REDACT and KEEP

steps.expected: Focused entity becomes REDACT and counts update
steps.observed: entity-3 changed to REDACT; chips changed from [1,0,3] to [2,0,2]

steps.action: Press K on the same focused entity
steps.expected: Focused entity becomes KEEP and counts update
steps.observed: entity-3 changed to KEEP; chips changed to [1,1,2]

evidence.network: No API/network activity required for this keyboard shortcut assertion

assertions.title: Count chips update live on every toggle

steps.action: Set focused entity-3 to REDACT and capture baseline counts
Toggle focused REDACT entity to KEEP (press K)
steps.expected: Removing decrements by 1, Keeping increments by 1, total remains constant
steps.observed: Counts changed to [1,1,2] with unchanged sum 4

evidence.network: No API/network activity required for this count-chip assertion

assertions.title: Download button disabled while uncertain items remain

steps.expected: Button is disabled with reduced opacity and not-allowed cursor
steps.observed: With counts [1,1,2], button had disabled=true, opacity=0.28, cursor=not-allowed

steps.action: Resolve all uncertain entities via Tab + R until uncertain=0
steps.expected: Button becomes enabled and clickable exactly when unresolved count reaches zero
steps.observed: After resolving, counts were [3,1,0], button disabled=false, opacity=1, cursor=pointer, and jump button disappeared

evidence.network: No API/network activity required for this button-state assertion

assertions.title: Start over clears all state and returns to drop screen

steps.action: Click "← Start over" from preview action bar
steps.expected: App returns to drop screen and clears review state
steps.observed: Returned to drop screen with browse/mode controls visible

steps.expected: No preview layout, highlights, action bar, or page indicator remain

evidence.network: No API/network activity required for this reset assertion

frictions.description: The file input is visually hidden in the drop screen, and agent-browser cannot interact with native file pickers directly.
frictions.resolution: Used browser-side DOM style override to expose input[type=file] and then uploaded fixture through agent-browser upload command.
